description: Synthetic multi-year 30-question assessment data calibrated from a private assessment score distribution. No real students, rosters, teachers, sections, IDs, emails, grades, submissions, or school records are included.

bootstrap.privateBootstrapSource: A private LMS export was used only to calibrate synthetic distribution shape; no private rows or identifiers are included.
bootstrap.zeroPolicy: Most bootstrap zeros are modeled as early non-participation/non-administration; a small true-zero rate remains for realism.
